a.xlink:title: Auto balances bots in teams after the player has changed team.
Kills player as a result of team change.
Sets the team of the player.
Returns the bitmask of the best teams for the player to join.
Returns whether one team is equal to the other.
Returns whether one team is smaller than the other.
print(), but only print if the server is not local
Initialize the score of this player if needed.
